== Notes for [[Item:Q101018|Q101018]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alfonso_de_Cartagena https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alfonso_de_Cartagena http://www.wikiburgos.es/wiki/Convento_de_San_Pablo_de_Burgos

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9C18571EFBBFA9822EF79916CD95D
geni:6000000053709162955

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
